evals.expected_output: LCP debugging that records trace, identifies LCP element and subpart (TTFB/load/render), suggests fixes.
assertions: Records trace with performance trace tools.
Identifies LCP subpart before recommending changes.
Compares before/after under same conditions for verification.

evals.prompt: The hero banner is slow to render, find the LCP resource and why it's delayed.
evals.expected_output: LCP concern routes to specialized LCP debugging skill.
assertions: Agent classifies as LCP / largest contentful paint work.
Focuses on waterfalls, resource discovery, render delay.

evals.prompt: Investigate growing JS heap on repeated navigation.
evals.expected_output: Handoff to memory leak debugging skill.
assertions: Does not use LCP skill for heap growth.
Does not start LCP trace for memory symptom.

evals.prompt: /chrome-devtools-debug-optimize-lcp record the trace to analyze LCP
evals.expected_output: Trace saved to explicit filePath outside version control.
assertions: Agent always specifies filePath for trace.
Advises not to commit trace files.
Cites: Keep trace files out of version control.

evals.prompt: Speed up LCP by inlining the hero CSS
evals.expected_output: Requires identifying which subpart (e.g. resource load vs render) is slow before suggesting inline.
assertions: Agent checks TTFB, resource load delay, render blocking before fix advice.
Cites: Identify the slow LCP subpart before recommending a fix.
Does not optimize bytes without load/render analysis.

evals.prompt: I applied the fix, re-analyze LCP now
evals.expected_output: Re-runs trace under identical network/CPU conditions to compare subparts.
assertions: Agent insists on same conditions for before/after comparison.
